name: GHT Co.,Ltd
summary: GHT Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and servicing of ICT-related products in China and internationally. The company offers H20-20 program-controlled exchange, IP switching, railway digital dispatching communication, converged video, network management, and audio recording systems. It offers its solutions to the defense, electric power, railway, and industrial sectors. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
